lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to my castle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you want me to do again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you want me to do again?

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Did you take that talisman to Sedridor?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I lost it.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Ah, well that explains things. One of my servants found it outside, and it seemed too much of a coincidence that another would suddenly show up.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Here, take it to the Wizards' Tower, south west of here. Please try not to lose it this time.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Take that talisman I gave you to Sedridor at the Wizards' Tower. You'll find it south west of here, across the bridge from Draynor Village.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, will do.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Greetings. Welcome to my castle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Well, I wouldn't describe it as a quest, but there is something I could use some help with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: We were recently sorting through some of the things stored down in the cellar, and we found this old talisman.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: The Order of Wizards over at the Wizards' Tower have been on the hunt for magical artefacts recently. I wonder if this might be just the kind of thing they're after.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Would you be willing to take it to them for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, no problem.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: Thank you very much. You'll find the Wizards' Tower south west of here, across the bridge from Draynor Village. When you arrive, look for Sedridor. He is the Archmage of the wizards there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Duke Horacio
lines.text: As you wish. Hopefully I can find someone else to help.

sections.title: Talking to Sedridor again after not having the talisman when first going through the dialogue

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Welcome back, adventurer. Do you have that talisman now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Well come back when you have it.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Welcome back, adventurer. Do you have that talisman now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Hmm... Doesn't seem to be anything too special. Just a normal air talisman by the looks of things. Still, looks can be deceiving. Let me take a closer look...

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: How interesting... It would appear I spoke too soon. There's more to this talisman than meets the eye. In fact, it may well be the last piece of the puzzle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Puzzle?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Indeed! The lost legacy of the first tower. This talisman may in fact be key to finding the forgotten essence mine!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: First tower? Forgotten essence mine? What are you on about?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Ah, my apologies, adventurer. Allow me to fill you in.

sections.title: Talking to Sedridor after giving him the talisman but before agreeing to go see Aubury

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So is that talisman of any use to you?

sections.title: Talking to Sedridor after agreeing to go see Aubury but before receiving the package.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Hello again, adventurer. Please, take this package of research notes to Aubury in Varrock. He runs a rune shop in the south east of the city.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Best of luck, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't remember telling you my name... How do you know it?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Really now? I am the Archmage you know.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Hello again, adventurer. Did you take that package to Aubury?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost it. Could I have another?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Well it's a good job I have copies of everything.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Best of luck, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't remember telling you my name... How do you know it?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Really now? I am the Archmage you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: He runs a rune shop in the south east of Varrock. Please deliver it to him soon.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Welcome adventurer, to the world renowned Wizards' Tower, home to the Order of Wizards. We are the oldest and most prestigious group of wizards around. Now, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you Sedridor?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Sedridor? What is it you want with him?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Duke of Lumbridge sent me to find him. I have this talisman he found. He said Sedridor would be interested in it.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Did he now? Well hand it over then, and we'll see what all the hubbub is about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here you are.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Hmm... Doesn't seem to be anything too special. Just a normal air talisman by the looks of things. Still, looks can be deceiving. Let me take a closer look...

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: How interesting... It would appear I spoke too soon. There's more to this talisman than meets the eye. In fact, it may well be the last piece of the puzzle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Puzzle?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Indeed! The lost legacy of the first tower. This talisman may in fact be key to finding the forgotten essence mine!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: First tower? Forgotten essence mine? What are you on about?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Ah, my apologies, adventurer. Allow me to fill you in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go ahead.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: As you are likely aware, when we cast spells, we do so using the power of runes.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: These runes are crafted from a highly unique material, and then imbued with magical power from various runic altars. Different altars create different runes with different magical effects.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: The process of imbuing runes is called runecrafting. Legend has it that this was once a common art, but the secrets of how to do it were lost until just under two hundred years ago.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: The rediscovery of runecrafting had such a large impact on the world, that it marked the dawn of the Fifth Age. It also resulted in the birth of our order, and the construction of the first Wizards' Tower.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If it was the first tower, I'm guessing it doesn't exist anymore? What happened?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: It was burnt down by traitorous members of our own order. They followed the evil god of chaos, Zamorak, and they wished to claim our magical discoveries in his name.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: When the tower burnt down, much was lost, including an important incantation. A spell that could be used to teleport to a hidden essence mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The essence mine you mentioned earlier, I assume?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Precisely. Rune essence is the material used to make runes, but it is incredibly rare. That essence mine was the only place it could be found that our order knew of.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Since the incantation was lost, we have struggled to maintain our stocks of rune essence.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: There are seemingly those out there that still know where to find some, but while they have been willing to sell essence to us, they have refused to share knowledge on how to find it ourselves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm starting to see why this is so important. So you think this talisman can help you rediscover that incantation?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: I do! All magic leaves traces, and from what I can tell, this talisman was used heavily during the time of the first tower.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: It would have been taken to the essence mine many times, and the magical energies there will have left an imprint on it. To think that it was hidden in Lumbridge all this time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what happens now?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: It is critical I share this discovery with my associate, Aubury, as soon as possible. He's not much of a wizard, but he's an expert on runecrafting, and his insight will be essential.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Would you be willing to visit him for me? I would go myself, but I wish to study this talisman some more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, certainly.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: He runs a rune shop in the south east of Varrock. Please, take this package of research notes to him. If all goes well, the secrets of the essence mine may soon be ours once more!

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Best of luck, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't remember telling you my name... How do you know it?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Really now? I am the Archmage you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm busy.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: As you wish adventurer. I will continue to study this talisman you have brought me. Return here if you find yourself with some spare time to help me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm not interested.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Oh... Well I guess the short of it is that this talisman could be key to helping us rediscover an important teleportation incantation.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: With it, we'll be able to access a hidden essence mine, our lost source of rune essence.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: It is critical I share this discovery with my associate, Aubury, as soon as possible. He's not much of a wizard, but he's an expert on runecrafting, and his insight will be essential.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Would you be willing to visit him for me? I would go myself, but I wish to study this talisman some more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here you are.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Well?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't seem to have it with me.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Hmm? You are a very odd person. Come back again when you have it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll only give it to Sedridor.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Well good news, for I am Sedridor! Now, hand it over and let me have a proper look at it, hmm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't think you are Sedridor.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Hmm... Well, I admire your caution adventurer. Perhaps I can prove myself? I will use my mental powers to discover...

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Your name is... [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're right! How did you know that?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Well I am the Archmage you know! You don't get to my position without learning a few tricks along the way!

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: So now that I have proved myself to you, why don't you hand over that talisman, hmm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here you are.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Hello. Did you take those notes back to Sedridor?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, but I lost them.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Well, luckily I have duplicates. It's a good thing they are written in code. I wouldn't want the wrong kind of person to get access to the information contained within.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Don't take too long. He'll be eager to see if this is indeed the breakthrough we were hoping for.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Now, did you want to buy some runes?

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Do you want to buy some runes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been sent here with a package for you.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: A package? From who?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: From Sedridor at the Wizards' Tower.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: From Sedridor? But... surely, he can't have? Please, let me have it. It must be extremely important for him to have sent a stranger.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Now, let's have a look...

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: This... this is incredible.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: My gratitude to you adventurer for bringing me these research notes. Thanks to you, I think we finally have it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean the incantation?

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Well when we combine my own research with this latest discovery, I think we might just...

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: No, no, I'm getting ahead of myself. The signs are promising, but let's not jump to any conclusions just yet.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Here, take these notes back to Sedridor. They should hopefully give him everything he needs.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Before you leave, why not have a cup of tea?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd love a cup of tea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aaah, nothing like a nice cuppa tea!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... yeah... about that... I kind of don't have it with me...

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: What kind of person says they have a delivery for me, but not with them? Honestly.

lines.speaker: Aubury
lines.text: Come back when you have it.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Ah, [player name]. How goes your quest? Have you delivered my research to Aubury yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have. He gave me some notes to give to you.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Wonderful! Let's have a look then.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Alright, let's see what Aubury has for us...

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Yes, this is it! The lost incantation!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you'll be able to access that essence mine now?

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: That's right! Because of you, our order finally has a proper source of rune essence again! Thank you, friend.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: If you ever want to access the essence mine yourself, just let me know. It's the least I can do.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: I will also share the incantation with others, including Aubury. When I do, I'll let them know that you are to be given unlimited access to the mine.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Oh, and you can have this air talisman back as well. I have no further need of it, and I'm sure you will find it useful.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: In case you didn't know, the talisman can be used to craft air runes. Just take it to the Air Altar south of Falador along with some rune essence.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Don't worry if you can't find the altar. The talisman can guide you there. You may find talismans for other altars as well while adventuring. They'll let you craft other types of rune.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! Thanks!

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: My pleasure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, you're not going to believe this...

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have them.

lines.speaker: Archmage Sedridor
lines.text: Right... You're rather careless aren't you. I suggest you go and speak to Aubury once more. With luck he will have made copies.
